name: Paella
recipeIngredient: 6-8 oz flavored tofu or tofu sausage (reduced-fat savory baked tofu)
2 cups black beans, cooked (mix drained beans with juice of one lemon)
2 cups uncooked long grain brown rice
1 cup fresh or frozen green peas
1 cup fresh or frozen corn kernels
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tofu into bite-sized pieces and set aside.
2. Heat 1-2 tablespoons of vegetable broth in a pot. Add garlic and sauté for about one minute, then add diced pepper and sauté until fragrant (1-2 minutes). Set aside.
3. Heat 1-2 tablespoons of vegetable broth in a largish pot. Add remaining garlic, onion, and carrot. Sauté for 2 minutes. Add paprika, fennel, cumin, salt, black pepper, cayenne (if desired), and saffron. Stir for 30 seconds, then add rice, boiling water, bay leaves, and tofu. Stir well and cover pot.
4. Cook over low heat for 40-45 minutes until water is absorbed and rice is cooked.
5. Add black beans, sautéed peppers, peas, and corn to the top of the rice. Replace the lid and let sit for 5 minutes.
6. Remove the lid and fluff the mixture with a fork. Discard bay leaves.
7. Serve garnished with cherry tomatoes and parsley or cilantro.
